🔒 100% private — no upload

Convert WEBP to JPG

Free, private, and instant — right in your browser.

Drag & drop your WEBP files here

🔒 Converted in your browser. Nothing is uploaded.

Need a plain JPG from a WebP image? This converter re-encodes WebP as JPG in your browser, flattening any transparency onto a white background so the result opens everywhere. Nothing is uploaded — the whole process is local.

How to convert

  1. Drag your WebP images into the box above.
  2. Transparent areas are flattened to white and saved as JPG.
  3. Download the JPG files.

FAQ

What happens to transparency?

JPG has no transparency, so transparent pixels become white. If you need transparency, convert to PNG instead.

Related converters

WEBP to PNGPNG to JPG

VaultConvert — free file converters that run entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device.
